Feedback Summary: Agents say it is difficult to find the right saved reply because their workspace has more than 200 approved responses across billing, onboarding, and troubleshooting topics.
Documentation Signal: Supports release note value for saved reply folders.
Notes for Writer: Useful evidence for explaining why folders matter. Avoid mentioning exact customer details.

Feedback Summary: Team leads want a better way to organise seasonal saved replies for returns, delivery delays, and promotions.
Documentation Signal: Supports KB examples for folder use cases.
Notes for Writer: Could inform help article examples, such as organising replies by topic or workflow.

Feedback Summary: Agents often open several previous tickets before replying because they cannot quickly see recent customer history from the profile page.
Notes for Writer: Good customer-impact signal. Use to frame the timeline as reducing context switching.

Feedback Summary: Support team reports that slow ticket search makes it harder to respond quickly during outage periods.
Notes for Writer: Use cautiously. Do not imply outage-specific functionality changed.

Feedback Summary: Agents sometimes miss SLA due times because key ticket details are spread across different parts of the ticket view.
Notes for Writer: Good reason to mention easier scanning of priority, status, assignee, tags, and SLA details.

Feedback Summary: Team leads want to identify tickets that waited too long for a first response, not just tickets that breached SLA.
Documentation Signal: Supports first response time report filter.
Notes for Writer: Useful for explaining reporting value. Confirm wording around first response time.

Feedback Summary: Agents in different time zones see different SLA due times and are unsure which deadline is correct.
Notes for Writer: Important customer-impact signal. Release note should clarify workspace timezone behaviour.

Feedback Summary: After merging duplicate customer requests, agents sometimes see repeated tags and are unsure whether the ticket was merged correctly.
Notes for Writer: Minor fix but customer-facing. Brief release note is enough.

Feedback Summary: Agents using saved replies with bullet lists need to manually fix spacing before sending responses.
Admins want operations leads to manage automation rules but do not want to give them full access to workspace settings.
Notes for Writer: Strong support signal. Useful for release notes and permissions documentation.

Feedback Summary: Admins are confused about which users can edit automation rules and where those permissions are controlled.
Documentation Signal: Supports KB update for permissions and automations.
Notes for Writer: Good evidence for help article update, not just release notes.

Feedback Summary: Large report exports sometimes take several minutes, and users are unsure whether the export has failed.
Notes for Writer: Include expectation-setting wording. Consider documentation note explaining background processing.
